description: A new lab analyst needs to be trained on a specific analytical instrument (e.g., GC-MS) before they can test samples on it.

nodes.task_description: Check the new analyst's current training record in the training management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the analyst has not yet been trained on the GC-MS.

nodes.task_description: Assign the 'GC-MS Operation and Maintenance' training module to the analyst.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully assigns the required training course.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a hands-on training session with a senior analyst.

expected_outcome.value: Agent notifies the senior analyst and schedules the practical training session.
